title: Callista griffithiana
taxonomy: Callista griffithiana is classified as a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Volutidae and the superfamily Muricoidea. The classification of Callista griffithiana is further detailed in its taxonomic hierarchy as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Mollusca, Class: Gastropoda, Order: Neogastropoda, Family: Volutidae, Genus: Callista, and Species: C. griffithiana. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species. The classification of Callista griffithiana is also used in scientific research and conservation efforts.
